name: bugfix
description: Standard bug-fix workflow: reproduce → diagnose → fix → verify

tasks.content: Reproduce the bug — confirm the issue exists
tasks.criteria: Bug behavior confirmed with clear steps to reproduce

tasks.content: Diagnose root cause — trace the bug to its source
tasks.criteria: Root cause identified with specific file:line reference
Code change addresses root cause without introducing regressions

tasks.content: Verify the fix — run tests and confirm bug is resolved
tasks.criteria: Original reproduction steps pass. All existing tests pass.
